name: SAP Ariba Procurement & Supply Chain API
what_it_does: SAP Ariba REST API for enterprise procurement and supply chain collaboration platform. Enables AI agents to manage purchase requisitions and orders via procure-to-pay (P2P) workflows, handle strategic sourcing and RFP management, access supplier information management and qualification, retrieve contract lifecycle management data, manage catalog management and guided buying, handle invoice processing and payment workflows, access spend analytics and category management data, retrieve supplier collaboration and ASN management, manage compliance and sustainability reporting, and integrate procurement data with SAP S/4HANA and ERP systems.
use_cases: Managing purchase orders and P2P workflows from procurement automation agents
Handling sourcing events and supplier RFPs from strategic sourcing agents
Accessing spend analytics and category data from procurement intelligence agents
Integrating procurement with SAP S/4HANA from enterprise ERP agents
not_for: Small businesses without enterprise procurement complexity
Non-SAP environments without Ariba Network supplier connectivity
Simple PO management without sourcing, contracts, and supplier management
best_when: An enterprise using SAP Ariba for procurement and supply chain wants AI agents to automate P2P workflows, sourcing events, supplier management, invoice processing, spend analytics, and S/4HANA integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: SAP Ariba manages enterprise procurement spending — automated PO creation and approval bypasses controls that prevent unauthorized spending. Supplier onboarding automation must validate compliance data. Contract automation must maintain audit trail. Invoice automation must comply with AP controls and SOX requirements.

auth.notes: SAP Ariba uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Application and user credentials with procurement, sourcing, and analytics scopes. SAP Business Accelerator Hub with API documentation and sandbox. Webhooks for procurement events. Ariba Network connects 4M+ suppliers. Deep SAP S/4HANA integration via SAP Integration Suite.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise procurement subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and transaction volume enterprise pricing; Procurement, Sourcing, and Network modules
pricing.notes: Walldorf, Germany (SAP SE). Ariba acquired by SAP 2012 for $4.3B. Founded 1996. Enterprise procurement and supply chain market leader. $1.5B+ revenue. 4M+ supplier network. Used by 70% of Fortune 500. Ariba Network is largest B2B commerce network. Deep SAP integration. Competes with Coupa and Jaggaer for enterprise procurement.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; batch processing preferred for bulk operations

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Automated PO creation bypasses procurement controls — spending limits and approval workflows are mandatory
Ariba Network supplier integration requires supplier registration — not all suppliers are on Ariba Network
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with SAP Business Accelerator Hub sandbox and documentation
SAP S/4HANA integration requires SAP Integration Suite — additional licensing and configuration
SOX compliance for procurement automation — audit trail requirements are strict for public companies
Batch operations preferred — real-time high-frequency API calls are discouraged; use async batch patterns
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise procurement and spend data. SOC2, ISO27001, SOX-ready. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Financial controls and spend authorization sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Procurement and supply chain data. SOC2, ISO27001, SOX. OAuth2. US/EU data residency. Spend authorization and financial controls.
